summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLT Academy ERP Reminder and Follow-ups features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Set Reminder on Sales CRM, Customer Service, Mentor CRM pages; Today's Follow-ups page with time slots; Environment Access checkboxes on User Management.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reminder and Follow-ups features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/leads/{id}/reminder, POST /api/leads/{id}/reminder/complete, POST /api/students/{id}/reminder, POST /api/students/{id}/reminder/complete, GET /api/followups/today. ReminderModal component used on Sales CRM, Customer Service, and Mentor CRM pages. Today's Follow-ups page (FollowupsPage.jsx) shows reminders grouped by time slots. User Management has environment_access field with Development/Testing checkboxes visible only to super_admin.
